title: Antigravity 3.0 (New Upgrades): Gemini 3.6, Agent Team-Up Option, Workbench, Low Thinking Effort
summary: Google released Antigravity 3.0 with slash teamwork preview for all paid plans, enabling parallel multi-agent coding tasks. New features include Google DeepMind Science Skills bundle for research workflows, improved Gemini 3.5 Flash, cheaper Gemini 3.5 Flash Low tier, and session syncing between CLI and desktop.
